business.geography_hint: Argentina (AR phone codes +54 9 11, Spanish, ARS prices)

engine.ladder_reasoning: No defined expertise sold and no portfolio-as-proof; the decision is browsing a shop's products/prices/promos and where to buy — a shop reads as 'place' among the closed engines. But the real job is a transactional catalog with cart/checkout, which the engines don't cover.

goal.one_action: buy lighting products (add to cart / checkout, or contact sales via WhatsApp to purchase)

structure.archetype_note: Full WooCommerce storefront: paginated product catalog (983 items), category grids, cart/checkout, plus shipping-cost, reviews and contact info pages. Not a single-conversion landing site.

mapped.observed_as: ¿Podemos ayudarte a iluminar tus ambientes? / Hacé click acá
Somos especialistas en iluminación y amamos el diseño
Iluminación por categoría (techo, pared, mesa, piso, led)
15% de descuento / 3 cuotas sin interés / Superofertas
Costos de envío por Vía Cargo o Buspack

unmapped.observed: Paginated product catalog with filters by type/quantity of lights/price range, cards with Comprar + Vista Rápida (983 products, 62 pages)
unmapped.why_no_fit: The section list has no id for a transactional product catalog / shop grid with filtering and add-to-cart — it is the site's spine, not a landing section

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce cart_or_checkout=true, 983 products with Comprar/Vista Rápida, ARS prices ($16.000–$2.975.000), installment + cash-discount payment terms — an on-site cart+checkout selling one-time goods

design_style.none_fits_because: Capture returned no fonts, colors, or dark/light signal (design_hints empty aside from photo-heavy image density); cannot assign a style confidently.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full; commerce, nav, CTAs, proof and section order all captured clearly. Store nature is unambiguous.

gap_findings: Transactional e-commerce (cart/checkout + 983-product filtered catalog) is outside the one-conversion-action model — engines and section list cannot express a shopping storefront.
Sale/purchase happens via WooCommerce cart OR via three role-split WhatsApp numbers (pre-sales x2, post-sales) — the goal mechanism vocab can't represent a hybrid cart+WhatsApp purchase path.
map-hours capability is claimed via listed address/hours but there is no actual map embed — capability vocab conflates 'has hours' with 'has interactive map'.
